mapper.update:
update base_warehouse_category
service_provider_id=#{serviceProviderId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
parent_id=#{parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
category_code=#{categoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
category_name=#{categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mnemonic_code=#{mnemonicCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state=#{state,jdbcType=TINYINT},
sort=#{sort},
remark=#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_by=#{createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
created_name=#{createdName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_date=#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modified_by=#{modifiedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
modified_name=#{modifiedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modified_date=#{modifiedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
deleted_flag=#{deletedFlag,jdbcType=TINYINT},
version=#{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update.foreach:
update base_warehouse_category
service_provider_id=#{item.serviceProviderId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
parent_id=#{item.parentId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
category_code=#{item.categoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
category_name=#{item.categoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mnemonic_code=#{item.mnemonicCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state=#{item.state,jdbcType=TINYINT},
remark=#{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_by=#{item.createdBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
created_name=#{item.createdName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_date=#{item.createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modified_by=#{item.modifiedBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
modified_name=#{item.modifiedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modified_date=#{item.modifiedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
deleted_flag=#{item.deletedFlag,jdbcType=TINYINT},
version=#{item.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}
where id = #{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
